mapper.select: select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId} and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_phone = #{memberPhone}

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail}

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, member_language, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where (member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId}) and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_name, member_nickname, member_handle, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_status = 'active' and (member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by member_nickname

select id, member_email, member_password, member_handle, member_phone, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime, member_name from tbl_member where member_handle = #{memberHandle} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname ,member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region ,member_status, member_role, push_enabled ,member_language, birth_date, created_datetime ,updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where id = #{id}

select id, member_name, member_email, member_nickname, member_handle, member_bio, member_region from tbl_member where member_status = 'active' and id != #{memberId} and ( lower(member_name) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(member_handle) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(member_nickname) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) and not exists ( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId} and blocked_id = tbl_member.id) or (blocker_id = tbl_member.id and blocked_id = #{memberId}) ) order by member_name limit 20
